privileged_info_summary: This task seeds 6 synthetic patients (PIDs 41-46) into NOSH ChartingSystem. A quality review file at /home/ga/Desktop/quality_review.txt lists all gaps. The agent must log in as demo_provider / Provider1234!. Four patients have care gaps requiring remediation: (1) Helen Mercer (PID 41, DOB 1956-08-14): missing Type 2 Diabetes E11.9 on problem list (Metformin 1000mg is already present), missing Sulfonamide allergy (reaction: skin rash, moderate), needs follow-up appointment July 15 2026 at 10:00 AM with Dr. James Carter, needs encounter note. (2) Frank Costello (PID 42, DOB 1949-03-22): Losartan dosage needs update from 50mg to 100mg daily (CKD N18.3 is on problem list, recent encounter exists so no appointment needed), needs encounter note. (3) Beatrice Yamamoto (PID 43, DOB 1960-12-01): missing Osteoporosis M81.0 on problem list (Hypothyroidism E03.9 exists), missing Alendronate 70mg weekly in medications (Levothyroxine 75mcg exists), missing Iodine contrast allergy (reaction: anaphylaxis, severe), has recent encounter so no appointment needed, needs encounter note. (4) Raymond Delacroix (PID 44, DOB 1952-06-30): missing GERD K21.0 on problem list (Atrial Fibrillation I48.91 exists), missing Omeprazole 20mg daily in medications (Warfarin 5mg exists), has existing Aspirin allergy (GI bleeding, severe) that should NOT be modified, needs follow-up appointment July 1 2026 at 9:00 AM, needs encounter note. Two noise patients must NOT be modified: Dorothy Nguyen (PID 45, DOB 1958-04-18) has Hypertension I10, Amlodipine 5mg, Penicillin allergy, and recent encounter; Walter Fitzgerald (PID 46, DOB 1954-11-05) has COPD J44.1, Tiotropium 18mcg, and recent encounter. The NOSH database uses rx_list table (not rx) with rxl_medication and rxl_dosage columns, issues table with issue column (contains diagnosis name and ICD code in brackets), and allergies table with allergies_med column. The schedule table uses Unix timestamps (int) for start/end fields. All patients are linked to provider_id=2 (Dr. James Carter) at practice_id=1 (Hillside Family Medicine).
